b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Security Features"}]
c:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Local-first"}],": All data stays in a local SQLite database by default"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Local embeddings"}],": Uses BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 via fastembed (384 dims) — no external API calls"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"No cloud required"}],": All data stays local by default"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Input sanitization"}],": All user inputs are parameterized"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Session isolation"}],": Separate session IDs isolate memory contexts"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Disaster recovery"}],": Backup and restore via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne.dr.recovery"}]]}],"\n"]}]
d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Embedding Model"}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}]," library for all embedding generation. This runs entirely locally — no text is ever sent to an external API."]}]
f:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L17",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"No External API Calls"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"By default, Mnemosyne does not send any data to external services. All embedding generation happens locally via fastembed. No OpenAI or other cloud embedding APIs are used."}]}]]}]]}]}]
